## How was this tested?

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My change is focused on one concern
- [ ] If I added a new IOC, I tested that the scanner detects it
- [ ] If I changed Swift code, I ran `make app` and verified it builds
- [ ] If I changed bash scripts, I ran them standalone to verify
- [ ] I updated docs / CHANGELOG if applicable
- [ ] I did NOT add telemetry, analytics, or auto-updaters
